## Validation

- [ ] `.\scripts\build.ps1`
- [ ] `.\scripts\verify.ps1 -TimeoutSeconds 300`
- [ ] Manual QEMU boot checked when UI/boot behavior changed

## Boot Impact

- [ ] Bootloader changed
- [ ] Kernel ABI or `BootInfo` changed
- [ ] Syscall ABI changed
- [ ] Userland command behavior changed
- [ ] Final image layout changed

## Notes

Mention any intentionally skipped validation, known limitations, or follow-up work.
